name: Ramsey Robinson
background: Socialist candidate focused on working-class issues and wealth inequality.
statement: I'm fighting for a California for the People, not the Billionaires. California's 194 billionaires hoard more wealth than 27 million of us. That's not an accident—it's a rigged system. We make California rich, but can't afford rent, medicine, or decent schools for our kids because billionaires extract the wealth we create. Our socialist campaign demands guaranteed housing capped at 20% of income, free healthcare, free childcare and union jobs at minimum $30/hour with a guaranteed dignified retirement. Stop deportations, abolish ICE! I'm fighting for socialism—a system where we working people have the political and economic power to meet our needs. Together we will end billionaire rule once and for all. Vote Socialist! Vote leftunityslate.org. Register Peace & Freedom Party.

positions.economy: Guaranteed housing capped at 20% of income; minimum $30/hour union jobs; guaranteed dignified retirement; tax the ultra-wealthy
positions.housing: Guaranteed housing capped at 20% of income
positions.education: Free childcare; decent schools for all
positions.laborRights: Union jobs at minimum $30/hour; workers control political and economic power
